description:
🕒 07:30–20:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Ecotourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-logcamp-bonomine-earlysummer/

This tour has been closed to new registrations due to organizer circumstances.

This tour takes you toward the summit of Bonomine (棒ノ嶺) via the beautiful Shiratani Stream route through gorge terrain, where you'll learn the basics of stream hiking and enjoy the natural beauty. Lunch and dinner feature specially prepared bento boxes and a dinner prepared by a game meat restaurant, giving you a chance to learn about wild game cuisine.

【Fee】23,000 yen per person (includes guide fee, meals, insurance)

【Capacity】5 people

【Guide】Tsuyoshi Shinohara (Affiliated with Japan Mountain Guides Association, Mountain Guide Stage III)

【What to bring】20-liter backpack (with full waterproofing), complete stream hiking gear, change of clothes, helmet, harness, mountaineering equipment, bus fare, bathing fee, train fare
location: 集合 西武池袋線「飯能駅」改札口
summary: ℹ️ RECRUITMENT CLOSED: Stream hiking at Bonomine and Gorge, source walk on Naguri River Shiratani Stream, and game meat dinner tour
